properties.description: Pulls web/app clickstream events from the analytics REST API. Paginated and throttled to respect the API's 60 req/min rate limit - one of the real challenges on this source (see README data challenges section).
annotations: retry + requestInterval were added after the first version got HTTP 429s during the daily run and silently lost the last page of events - now it backs off and retries instead of failing the whole pipeline.
